title: Bedtime Story for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
HUSH HUSH! Benny tiptoes under twinkle stars!
A gentle bedtime story helps toddlers settle with calm breaths.
Benny and Moon Pillow practice a cozy night routine together.
Soft kid-safe cartoon storytelling for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
